task_completion.description: Open Screaming Frog SEO Spider and start crawling the target URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog UI is visible with 'https://books.toscrape.com/' entered in the URL bar at the top, and the crawl progress bar indicates active or completed crawling.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Content tab to view Flesch Reading Ease scores.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Content' tab is selected in the Screaming Frog interface, and the main data table displays readability metrics, specifically a column named 'Flesch Reading Ease Score'.

task_completion.description: Export the Content analysis data to the specified CSV path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog box or file manager showing the file 'readability_audit.csv' being saved to the directory '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' (or '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/').

task_completion.description: Sort the data to find the URL with the lowest Flesch Reading Ease score.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data table in Screaming Frog is sorted by the 'Flesch Reading Ease Score' column in ascending order (lowest numbers at the top), or a specific row with a very low score is highlighted.

task_completion.description: Save a text file containing the URL with the lowest Flesch Reading Ease score.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the creation of 'hardest_to_read.txt' in '~/Documents/SEO/reports/' (or '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/') containing a URL from the scraped site.

integrity.description: The agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl and export.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the Screaming Frog application interface (clicking tabs, export buttons, sorting columns) rather than just terminal commands mocking the output files.

integrity.description: The exported data and identified URL come from an actual crawl of the target site.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog interface shows multiple rows of data with URLs starting with 'https://books.toscrape.com/' and varying readability scores, proving the crawl was actually executed.

integrity.description: The agent saved the files in the exact requested directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: File save dialogs, text editors, or terminal windows explicitly show the absolute paths '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/' and '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/' being used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL is https://books.toscrape.com/. The expected CSV path is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/readability_audit.csv and the expected text report path is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/hardest_to_read.txt. In Screaming Frog, the relevant column for Flesch Reading Ease is actually named 'Flesch Reading Ease Score'. The CSV must contain at least one row of data and a header containing 'flesch' or 'readability'. The text file must contain the URL corresponding to the lowest score found in the crawl.
